summary: Completed testing after CORS fix. Backend APIs working excellently (94.7% success rate). Frontend CORS issue resolved - login form and OTP form now working. However, OTP verification still failing, preventing full authentication flow completion.

minor_bugs.issue: OTP verification timing issues with Redis TTL expiry during testing
minor_bugs.symptoms: OTP verification returns 400 status, demo OTP changes frequently due to TTL

critical_bugs.issue: OTP verification consistently fails with 400 error, redirects back to login
critical_bugs.symptoms: Demo OTP displayed correctly but verification API call returns 400, page redirects to login

resolved_issues.issue: CORS issue preventing login API calls
resolved_issues.details: Login form now submits successfully, OTP form appears correctly

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix OTP verification issue: 1) OTP verification API consistently returns 400 error for both admin and demo users, 2) Investigate Redis OTP storage/retrieval timing issues, 3) Check OTP TTL configuration and demo OTP generation logic, 4) Verify OTP validation logic in backend

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (login and OTP form working, verification failing)
